response.original_title: Dom Pérignon x Lady Gaga: The Labor of Creation (Director's Cut)
response.overview: Dom Pérignon and Lady Gaga celebrate the devotion to the inspiring, uplifting labor of creation. Because creation requires time to elevate and transcend.  Discover the director’s cut by the talented Woodkid, who made a point of devising a modern approach to contrast with Hautvillers’ centuries of craft.
response.title: Dom Pérignon x Lady Gaga: The Labor of Creation (Director's Cut)
